licensing_information.how_did_you_hear_about_kelly_right:
I first heard about Kelly Right in 2019 through a combination of online research and local agent word-of-mouth. I was looking for a brokerage with strong technology tools and more flexible commission structures after spending several years at a traditional franchise brokerage.

The initial introduction came from a Facebook group for Pacific Northwest real estate professionals where several Spokane-area agents were talking about their experiences moving to Kelly Right, specifically mentioning the support they received as they transitioned and the lower monthly fees. That piqued my interest, so I started digging deeper.

I then researched the company website, watched a couple of recorded webinars about their virtual brokerage model, and read reviews on BiggerPockets and a few real estate forums. Around the same time, one of my colleagues at my previous brokerage, who had just joined Kelly Right, shared her detailed experience with me over coffee—she walked me through how their transaction management system worked, the responsiveness of the broker support team, and how lead distribution had impacted her business.

All of those touchpoints together—online forums, social media conversations, the official Kelly Right website, and direct conversations with an existing Kelly Right agent—convinced me to schedule an informational call with the recruiting team, which ultimately led to my decision to join.
licensing_information.referred_by: Sarah Coleman (current Kelly Right agent in Spokane, WA)
